summary: F1 Debug-watch regression closed and pinned by DebugWatch_OnChange_FiresOnEveryReplacement + 6 contract tests for the new 'events follow the name, Properties stay with Data' semantics. Coder went structurally cleaner than my v1 partial-revert suggestion: unconditional event alias on Variables.Set replacement, CarryStateFromSource deleted, variable.set pure mint+store, Variables.Set sole state-survival site. C# 2533/2542 (9 honest stubs), plang 166/166. F2/F3/F4 carryovers from v1 unchanged (not blocking, can ride future cleanup). One minor non-regressing observation N1: Value-setter fires OnChange(this,this) — handlers see same Data twice on direct mutation; affects only OnTypeChange watches via Variables.Set non-Data path; user-visible set %x% paths unaffected. Recommend merge; optional fresh security review on JSON-roundtrip expansions still not on file.
